name: Pedro Sabio
title: AI and Data Science Consultant
bio: I help organizations harness the power of artificial intelligence to drive innovation and growth. With over a decade of experience in machine learning, natural language processing, and data strategy, I partner with leadership teams to turn complex AI concepts into actionable business outcomes.

services.title: AI Training & Workshops
services.description: Hands-on training programs designed to upskill your team on machine learning fundamentals, prompt engineering, and responsible AI practices. Customized for technical and non-technical audiences alike.

services.title: AI Strategy & Roadmapping
services.description: End-to-end strategic planning to identify high-impact AI opportunities, assess organizational readiness, and build a phased adoption roadmap aligned with your business objectives.

services.title: Custom AI Development
services.description: From proof-of-concept to production — I design, build, and deploy bespozxed AI solutions including predictive models, intelligent automation, and conversational AI systems.
